productName: Full Spec - Elite - Cartridge - 1g - (Core 4) (H) Purple Churro
description: A hybrid vape cartridge filled with Purple Churro oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Flavor on the go, with notes of apple, berry, and diesel, leading into a versatile, anytime balance.
